で、調達先とのマッチングを⽀援します。万博に向けて、必要な商品やサービスは、ぜひ開
催地⼤阪で調達してください。

[PDFより]
Would
you like to find
a supplier
in Osaka?
MOZUYAN
MALL
Business Matchmaking
System for EXPO2025
Mozuyan © 2014
Osaka Prefecture
Mozuyan Mall is a procurement support website related to Expo 2025 Osaka,
Kansai, Japan.
We will provide information on goods and services to companies looking to
procure Expo-related needs in Osaka, and support matching with companies
and small and medium-sized businesses in Osaka.
We will respond to projects like this!
I want to find Osaka-like goods as souvenirs for guests.
I want to procure food and tableware to be used at the reception.
I'm looking for a contractor to do work such as guiding people
around the pavilion.
I'm looking for take-out containers and materials that are
considerate of SDGs.
Mozuyan Mall has two features！
You can search in supplier list.
You can find new suppliers!
You can search for Osaka specialty.
You can search 290,000 companies from all over Japan.
* You can search companies that are members of chamber of commerce and industry all over Japan
using Mozuyan Mall relevance The business mall.
Search
Information

businesses in Osaka
You can have business negotiation.
You can receive proposals from many fields companies!
You can have online business negotiation without any hassle!
Efficient matching with buyers and sellers.

suggestions

businesses in Osaka
